content: Adrenal fatigue is characterized by symptoms such as general fatigue, sleep problems, lack of sex drive, and lack of motivation.
To combat adrenal fatigue, one can consume an adrenal cocktail consisting of 4 oz of orange juice mixed with 1/4 teaspoon of cream of tartar and Himalayan pink salt.
Ashwagandha is an adaptogen that increases GABA, a neurotransmitter blocking signals between nerve cells, helping to better adapt to stress.
Fish oil has a direct effect on lowering the body's response to stress as it pertains to mental stressors such as work, home life.
To give your adrenal glands a break, lay off stimulants like coffee, tea.
